observation: snRNA family includes RNAseq and ATACseq objects; microglial dataset remains manual-download-only.
Original region split inferred snRNA regions only from simple path tokens and did not distinguish RNAseq from ATACseq robustly.
Original QC loader globbed every non-spatial .h5ad, so ATAC donor objects were eligible for snRNA QC.
Original donor and region column matching missed 'Donor ID' and 'Brain Region', causing donor/region to collapse to unknown and risking duplicate region processing.
30 of 30 downloaded RNAseq donor objects currently have QC outputs.
30 donor objects currently propagate to normalized or annotated outputs.
